{{- /* Modelplane provider repo link: a GitHub icon linking to the provider repo, keeping the table narrow. The repo name and maturity show on hover. {{< repolink "https://github.com/org/repo" "org/repo" "community" >}} Arg 1 (repo) and arg 2 (status) are optional. The output must stay on one line with no trailing newline: this runs inside a Markdown table cell, and a stray newline splits the row and leaves an empty row behind. */ -}} {{- $url := .Get 0 -}} {{- $repo := .Get 1 | default $url -}} {{- $status := .Get 2 -}} {{- $label := $repo -}} {{- with $status -}}{{- $label = printf "%s (%s)" $repo . -}}{{- end -}} {{- /* trim the trailing newline above */ -}}
